vBRIEFInfo.author: panopticon-cli/0.0.0
vBRIEFInfo.description: Plan for PAN-569: Bulk-close issues from kanban board

narratives.Problem: Closing issues on the kanban board is one-at-a-time. Sprint cleanup with many done issues is tedious and time-consuming.
narratives.Proposal: Add multi-select checkboxes to issue cards and column headers, a floating bulk action bar, and a POST /api/issues/bulk-close-out endpoint that runs the full closeOut lifecycle sequentially per issue. Show progress modal during execution.

narrative.Action: Add new Effect HTTP route in src/dashboard/server/routes/issues.ts. Accepts { issueIds: string[] }, iterates sequentially calling closeOut() per issue via the existing lifecycle module, collects per-issue results. Emits per-issue issue.statusChanged events (already handled by closeOut). Wire route into issuesRouteLayer.

subItems.title: POST /api/issues/bulk-close-out accepts { issueIds: string[] } and returns { results: Array<{ issueId, success, error?, skipped? }> }
Each issue runs the full closeOut() lifecycle (verify merge, archive, teardown, close on tracker, clear review status)
If one issue fails, remaining issues still proceed (no short-circuit)
Route is wired into issuesRouteLayer and accessible at /api/issues/bulk-close-out

items.title: Create useBulkSelection hook for multi-select state

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/hooks/useBulkSelection.ts. Hook manages a Set<string> of selected issue IDs. Exports: selectedIds, toggle(id), selectAll(ids), deselectAll(ids), clear(), isSelected(id), count. Clear selection when issues list changes identity (prevents stale selections).

subItems.title: Hook exports toggle, selectAll, deselectAll, clear, isSelected, count, and selectedIds
Toggling an already-selected ID removes it; toggling an unselected ID adds it
clear() resets selection to empty set

items.title: Add selection checkbox and selected styling to IssueCard

narrative.Action: Add a checkbox to the top-left corner of each IssueCard in KanbanBoard.tsx. Wire it to useBulkSelection.toggle(). Apply subtle highlight border/background when selected. Checkbox click must not trigger the existing single-select (onSelect) behavior — use stopPropagation.

subItems.title: Each IssueCard renders a checkbox in the top-left corner
Clicking the checkbox toggles selection without triggering the card's single-select onClick
Selected cards have a visually distinct highlight (border or background change)

items.title: Add select-all checkbox to kanban column headers

narrative.Action: Add a checkbox to each kanban column header. When checked, calls selectAll() with all issue IDs in that column. When unchecked, calls deselectAll() for those IDs. Checkbox shows indeterminate state when some but not all column issues are selected.

subItems.title: Each kanban column header has a select-all checkbox
Checking it selects all issues in that column; unchecking deselects them
Checkbox shows indeterminate state when some (but not all) column issues are selected

narrative.Action: Create src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/BulkActionBar.tsx. Fixed-position bar at bottom of viewport, appears when selectedIds.size > 0. Shows 'N issues selected', 'Close Out' button, and 'Cancel' button (clears selection). Animate in/out with CSS transition.

subItems.title: Bar appears at bottom when 1+ issues are selected, hidden when none selected
Shows count of selected issues (e.g., '3 issues selected')
Cancel button clears all selections
Close Out button triggers the bulk close-out flow

narrative.Action: Before executing bulk close-out, check if any selected issues have running agents. If so, show a warning dialog listing those issues and their agents. User can 'Proceed (skip issues with agents)' or 'Cancel'. Skipped issues appear in results as skipped. Reuse the existing AgentWarningDialog pattern/styling.

subItems.title: If any selected issues have running agents, a warning dialog appears before execution
Dialog lists which issues have active agents
Proceeding skips issues with active agents; those appear as skipped in results

items.title: Progress modal for bulk close-out execution

narrative.Action: Show a modal during bulk close-out execution with per-issue status rows (pending → running → done/failed/skipped). Modal is non-dismissable during execution. On completion, show summary (N succeeded, N failed, N skipped) with a Close button. Clear selection on close.

subItems.title: Modal appears during execution showing per-issue status (pending/running/done/failed/skipped)
Modal cannot be dismissed while operation is in progress
On completion, shows summary counts and a Close button that clears selection

items.title: Wire bulk close-out mutation into KanbanBoard

narrative.Action: In KanbanBoard.tsx, add useMutation for POST /api/issues/bulk-close-out. Wire Close Out button in BulkActionBar → agent guardrail check → confirmation → mutation → progress modal → refresh dashboard state on completion. Selection clears after successful completion.

subItems.title: Clicking Close Out in the action bar triggers the full flow: guardrail → confirm → execute → progress → refresh
Dashboard state refreshes after bulk operation completes (issues appear in done column)
Selection is cleared after the operation completes and progress modal is closed

items.title: Add selection checkboxes to list view rows

narrative.Action: Add selection checkboxes to ListIssueRow component (list-grouped view). Same toggle behavior as IssueCard checkboxes. BulkActionBar works across both views since it reads from the same useBulkSelection hook.

subItems.title: ListIssueRow renders a selection checkbox
Selections persist when switching between kanban and list views
